roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL SENTENCE/AJW/CH5 SP 3Y L/DEF TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 562 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 562 SAGE FOR ATOTAL OF 1124 DAYS,/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/STATES/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE:10-19-20/PAR70/WEAP/WEAP2/EMTERM/DISM3/RESTR

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 5, A FELONY CHARGE OF 245(B)PC, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:5/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:10-19-20/PPRF/ARBUCKLE/X:REMAINING COUNTS WILL BE DISMISSED AT SENTENCING/CONTD:PROOF OF AFFIXATION OF GPS DEVICE/DOP/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/WS/WEAP/X:THE DEFENDANT IS TO LIVE WITH HIS PARENTS IN SAN PABLO UNTIL SENTENCING AND UNDERGO OUTPATIENT DRUG TREATMENT/ /CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 03-22-19/987,2/BAIL:150,000/SAORD/SA1:HECTOR PRADO BECERRA/SA2:SUPER DUPER BURGERS - 721MARKET ST, SF/SAORD3/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HRG & ACMPOST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/
